title: [Bug]: `stddev_samp()` 返回了预期之外的NULL
description: master分支版本，对于参数为常数的`stddev_samp()`，返回了预期之外的NULL
poc: CREATE RESOURCE UNIT 4c7g MAX_CPU 4, MIN_CPU 4, MEMORY_SIZE '7G';
create resource pool pool_test unit='4c7g', unit_num=1, zone_list=('zone1' ,'zone2', 'zone3');
create tenant test resource_pool_list=('pool_test'), primary_zone='RANDOM',comment 'test tenant', charset='utf8' set ob_tcp_invited_nodes='%', recyclebin=OFF, ob_query_timeout=5000000;
key_bug_features: stddev_samp() returns unexpected NULL for constant parameters
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10.0, 'Sample data');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (2, 20.0, 'Another sample');
SELECT stddev_samp(value) FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT stddev_samp(CASE WHEN value > 15 THEN value ELSE NULL END) FROM test_table;
